summary.en: Markets stayed mixed under the same macro headline: energy-driven inflation pressure. Oil remained elevated enough to keep 'higher for longer' rate fears alive, which capped broad risk appetite, but Nasdaq still showed relative resilience as investors kept rotating toward higher-quality growth instead of fully abandoning tech.
summary.zh: 今天市场依然被同一条宏观主线牵着走：能源推动的通胀压力。油价仍处高位，足以让市场继续交易“利率更高、更久”，压制广义风险偏好；但纳指仍表现出相对韧性，说明资金不是完全撤出科技，而是在往更高质量的成长资产收缩。

title.en: Hot inflation print keeps 'higher for longer' back in the market
title.zh: 通胀数据偏热，市场重新强化“更高更久”的利率定价

impact.en: Yahoo Finance's live market coverage pointed to March CPI pressure driven by energy costs. For equities, this matters because energy-led inflation feeds directly into Fed path uncertainty, long-end Treasury yields, and valuation compression for long-duration growth assets.
impact.zh: Yahoo Finance 的盘中报道显示，3 月 CPI 压力明显受能源成本推动。对美股来说，这很关键，因为能源驱动的通胀会直接传导到美联储路径不确定性、长端美债收益率，以及长久期成长资产的估值压缩。

macroRisk.en: Yes - this is a macro/systemic risk because energy inflation can quickly reprice Fed expectations, Treasury yields, and style leadership across the whole market.
macroRisk.zh: 是——这是典型的宏观/系统性风险，因为能源通胀会迅速重定价美联储预期、美债收益率，以及全市场的风格领涨结构。

title.en: 10Y Treasury yield stays elevated around 4.315%, keeping pressure on equity duration
title.zh: 10 年期美债收益率维持在约 4.315%，继续压制股票久期

impact.en: Yahoo Finance market data showed the 10Y yield near 4.315%. That level is not catastrophic, but it is high enough to prevent a clean risk-on expansion in software, speculative AI names, and other multiple-sensitive parts of the market.
impact.zh: Yahoo Finance 市场数据显示，10 年期美债收益率约为 4.315%。这个水平不算灾难，但已经足够高，足以阻止软件、投机型 AI 标的和其他估值敏感板块出现干净的 risk-on 扩张。

macroRisk.en: Yes - yields are the bridge between inflation headlines and equity multiples, especially in tech-heavy indexes.
macroRisk.zh: 是——收益率是连接通胀 headline 和股票估值的桥梁，尤其对科技权重高的指数更关键。

title.en: Oil is still the key swing variable, though markets are also pricing partial de-escalation
title.zh: 油价仍是最关键的摇摆变量，但市场也在交易局势部分缓和

impact.en: CNBC's markets page showed both inflation-war concern and a softer-oil angle tied to negotiation headlines. That tells us the market is oscillating between two scenarios: sustained energy shock versus partial geopolitical relief. Oil remains the fastest transmission channel into inflation and sector rotation.
impact.zh: CNBC 的市场页面同时出现了“战争推升通胀风险”和“谈判消息令油价回落”两条线索，说明市场正在两个情景之间摇摆：持续的能源冲击，或部分地缘缓和。油价依然是传导到通胀和行业轮动最快的通道。

macroRisk.en: Yes - if geopolitical headlines worsen again, oil can rapidly reprice inflation expectations, yields, and market leadership within hours.
macroRisk.zh: 是——如果地缘 headline 再次恶化，油价可能在数小时内重新推高通胀预期、收益率和市场领涨结构。

title.en: Software and parts of the AI trade remain selective after the recent selloff scare
title.zh: 软件和部分 AI 交易仍然偏选择性，近期抛售阴影还没完全消散

impact.en: CNBC highlighted continued software weakness after recent Anthropic-related AI selloff discussion. This does not mean the AI theme is broken, but it does mean the market is now rewarding actual earnings durability over pure narrative momentum.
impact.zh: CNBC 提到在近期与 Anthropic 相关的 AI 抛售讨论后，软件板块仍偏弱。这不代表 AI 主线崩了，但说明市场现在更愿意奖励真正能兑现盈利的公司，而不是纯叙事动量。

macroRisk.en: Partly - this is not purely macro, but higher yields amplify the pressure on crowded narrative-driven growth trades.
macroRisk.zh: 部分算——这不完全是宏观风险，但更高的收益率会放大拥挤型、叙事驱动成长交易的压力。

title.en: Index action is mixed rather than panicked, pointing to rotation instead of broad liquidation
title.zh: 指数表现分化而非恐慌，更像轮动而不是全面去风险

impact.en: Yahoo Finance showed S&P 500 around -0.13%, Dow around -0.52%, and Nasdaq around +0.26%, with VIX near 19.92. That structure says money is still in the market, but it is flowing toward selective quality and away from macro-fragile or rate-sensitive exposures.
impact.zh: Yahoo Finance 显示，标普约 -0.13%，道指约 -0.52%，纳指约 +0.26%，VIX 约 19.92。这个结构说明资金并未全面离场，而是在向更高质量资产集中，同时回避对宏观更脆弱或利率更敏感的敞口。

macroRisk.en: Yes - mixed index action can flip quickly if oil or rates make another leg higher, so this remains a headline-sensitive equilibrium.
macroRisk.zh: 是——如果油价或利率再上一个台阶，这种分化结构会很快翻转，因此当前仍是对 headline 高度敏感的均衡。

ai.en: AI remains alive, but leadership is narrowing. Investors still want the theme, just with more discipline around valuation and earnings quality.
ai.zh: AI 主线还在，但领涨范围在收窄。资金依然想要这个主题，只是对估值和盈利质量更挑剔了。

semiconductor.en: Semis should still behave better than high-valuation software if rates stop rising further, but they are no longer insulated from macro duration pressure.
semiconductor.zh: 如果利率不再继续上冲，半导体的表现通常仍会好于高估值软件，但它们也不再能完全隔绝宏观久期压力。

bigTech.en: Big Tech remains the market's quality-growth refuge. Nasdaq's relative strength versus the Dow supports that read.
bigTech.zh: 大科技仍然是市场避风港式的高质量成长资产。纳指相对道指更强，也印证了这一点。

energy.en: Energy is still the cleanest beneficiary of geopolitical and inflation stress. As long as oil stays elevated, the sector keeps relative strength optionality.
energy.zh: 能源仍然是地缘和通胀压力下最直接的受益方向。只要油价维持高位，这个板块就保留相对强势的期权价值。

ev.en: EVs remain tactically weak. High rates and softer discretionary sentiment are a bigger near-term force than the longer-term benefit of higher gasoline prices.
ev.zh: 电动车方向短线依旧偏弱。高利率和可选消费情绪转弱的影响，暂时大于高油价对长期需求的理论利好。

market.en: Broad market tone is mixed, not broken. This is a rotation tape, not a clean capitulation tape.
market.zh: 大盘整体是分化，不是崩。现在更像轮动市，不是干净的恐慌性抛售。

preciousMetals.en: Gold remains elevated as both a geopolitical hedge and inflation hedge, but upside is partially capped if real yields stay firm.
preciousMetals.zh: 黄金仍维持高位，既是地缘对冲也是通胀对冲，但若实际利率维持坚挺，它的上行空间会被部分限制。

oil.en: Oil is still the market's master variable. If it cools, tech breathes. If it re-accelerates, inflation and rates retake control quickly.
oil.zh: 原油依然是市场的总开关。它降温，科技就能喘口气；它再上冲，通胀和利率就会很快重新接管市场。

futures.en: Available market snapshot suggested a mixed tape rather than a clean directional move: S&P 500 around -0.13%, Dow around -0.52%, Nasdaq around +0.26%. The message is rotation, not panic.
futures.zh: 当前可见市场快照更像分化而不是单边方向：标普约 -0.13%，道指约 -0.52%，纳指约 +0.26%。核心信息是轮动，不是恐慌。

treasury10Y.en: U.S. 10Y Treasury near 4.315%. This remains high enough to cap multiple expansion in speculative growth.
treasury10Y.zh: 10 年期美债约 4.315%。这个水平仍足以压制投机型成长板块的估值扩张。

dxy.en: Dollar tone stayed firm enough to reflect macro caution, even though the market is not in full risk-off mode.
dxy.zh: 美元整体仍偏强，反映市场对宏观仍有戒心，虽然并未进入全面 risk-off。

oil.en: Crude was around 96.28 in the visible Yahoo Finance snapshot. That is off panic extremes, but still high enough to keep inflation sensitivity elevated.
oil.zh: Yahoo Finance 可见快照里，原油约在 96.28 左右。虽然已脱离恐慌极值，但仍足够高，足以让市场继续对通胀保持敏感。

keyRisk.en: The key risk is another geopolitical headline that pushes oil back up and transmits through inflation expectations -> Treasury yields -> growth equity valuation.
keyRisk.zh: 今天最关键的风险点仍是新的地缘 headline 再次把油价推上去，并沿着“通胀预期 -> 美债收益率 -> 成长股估值”这条链条放大波动。

note.en: This is a mixed, macro-led tape. The market is not abandoning risk entirely, but it is getting more selective: quality growth can still work, while macro-fragile and valuation-heavy exposures remain vulnerable as long as oil and yields stay elevated.
note.zh: 今天是典型的宏观驱动分化市。市场并没有完全抛弃风险资产，但明显变得更挑剔了：高质量成长还能跑，宏观更脆弱、估值更重的敞口，只要油价和收益率维持高位，就仍然容易挨打。
